active.name: Poisoned Blade
active.rawText: Deals 12 (+60% Attack) damage and applies Burn for 2 turns, stacking up to 3 times.

passives.name: Opening Strike
passives.rawText: This hero's first attack each combat deals 100% bonus damage.

passives.name: Bleed Out
passives.rawText: Burn damage dealt by this hero is increased by 20%.

passives.name: Shadow Reserve
passives.rawText: While benched, grant this hero's Burn bonus to the frontline ally.
